receipt.title: Cursor Disk Inventory Reconciliation Addendum
scope_notes: .git, node_modules, .venv, __pycache__, and .cursor were excluded from file hashing.
Git state was collected through Git commands instead.
Roman numeral path matching was corrected after the initial pass because word-boundary matching does not split on underscore.
The CSV or package checksums were not recomputed after the correction; exact interpretation requires artifact inspection.

conflict_updates.basis: Live root located under gradient-institution; final PDF found at three mirrored paths; all three match the known SHA-256.
conflict_updates.remaining_work: Classify one path as canonical release and the others as registered mirrors; do not delete duplicates.

conflict_updates.basis: No CL-VI collection candidate found across the scanned roots.
conflict_updates.remaining_work: Preserve the designation as unassigned until explicit Founder action.

conflict_updates.basis: Disk inventory found only one initiation/status handoff and no high-confidence collection tree.
Disk inventory directly quantified exact duplicate groups.
conflict_updates.remaining_work: Classify canonical, mirror, release duplicate, copied working file, and unknown groups before migration.

conflict_updates.basis: The Gradient, gradient-institution, and My Drive Death Bit roots were scanned.
conflict_updates.remaining_work: Choose the canonical operational root only after duplicate and authority mapping.

open_gaps: Independent inspection of the seven returned artifacts
Clarification and regeneration of package checksums after Roman-numeral matcher correction
phase_status.phase_01_entry_condition: The returned disk inventory artifacts are uploaded and independently inspected, and the post-correction output package has an internally consistent checksum manifest.
